home.title: Prevent Robotic Arm Failures Before They Happen
home.subtitle: Real-time AI Digital Twin for predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, and RUL estimation.
home.disclaimer: Live AI Simulation — SIASUN SR12A Digital Twin
home.processTitle: Zero downtime for industrial robotic arms.
home.processDesc: By analyzing J1-J6 joint sequences, current, temperature, and vibration in real-time, our AI instantly calculates degradation risk and schedules maintenance exactly when required.
home.splitTitle: Real-time Digital Twins for robotic arm health.
home.splitDesc: Each robot is mirrored in a live 3D model, tracking joint-level degradation, thermal stress, and vibration anomalies. Detect failures before they impact production.

cta.title: Start monitoring your robotic fleet before the next failure.
cta.healthDesc: Joint telemetry (J1–J6), tracking temperature, vibration, and current.
cta.aiDesc: LSTM-based failure prediction and Remaining Useful Life (RUL) estimation.

platform.title: A unified platform for robotic arm reliability.
platform.subtitle: Centralize edge telemetry, AI inference models, and real-time alerts into a single cohesive operating system designed for zero downtime.
platform.feat1Desc: Continuous high-frequency polling from industrial protocols measuring J1-J6 axes, thermal profiles, and amperage draw.
platform.feat2Desc: Embedded LSTM networks analyzing operational time series to isolate micro-degradations and predict RUL.
platform.feat3Desc: Interactive 3D replicas instantly rendering the physical state of the fleet into visual stress heatmaps.
platform.feat4Desc: Smart maintenance scheduling triggered exactly when a monitored threshold suggests anomalous wear.

digitalTwin.title: A live 3D replica of your robotic arm.
digitalTwin.subtitle: Every axis, joint, and bearing tracked in real-time. Detect thermal stress and mechanical degradation instantly.
digitalTwin.feat1Desc: Continuous surface temperature tracking mapped against dynamic tolerances.
digitalTwin.feat2Desc: High-frequency oscillation detection predicting nearing mechanical failures.
digitalTwin.feat3Desc: Cumulative wear analytics on J1-J6 sequences estimating Remaining Useful Life.

aiEngine.title: AI models that predict failures before they happen.
aiEngine.subtitle: Built on LSTM architecture and continuous time-series validation. Let the data determine your maintenance schedule.
aiEngine.lstmDesc: Unlike simple threshold alerting, ARM Health leverages Long Short-Term Memory networks to understand the temporal sequence of your hardware. A micro-vibration today is correlated with temperature spikes from last week to output an exact Remaining Useful Life (RUL) score.
aiEngine.valDesc: Continuous context sliding windows process telemetry streams instantly.
aiEngine.scoreDesc: Every robot is assigned a 0-100 health index based on predictive baseline deviation.

fleet.title: Monitor and manage your entire robotic fleet.
fleet.subtitle: Scale from 10 to 10,000 industrial arms seamlessly. Centralized oversight, macro-alerts, and cross-site comparison logic.
fleet.mapDesc: Cross-comparing site performance across global zones.

useCases.title: Predictive maintenance for welding robots.
useCases.subtitle: Discover how automotive plants and high-speed assembly lines prevent critical failures using continuous thermal and vibrational modeling.
useCases.desc1: High payload welding cycles cause micro-degradation in J2 and J3 joints. Traditional periodic maintenance invariably misses early-onset wear, resulting in unplanned 4-hour production halts costing thousands per minute.
useCases.desc2: Continuous real-time telemetry processing using cloud AI to benchmark torque and vibration against a 3D digital model.
useCases.desc3: 92% reduction in unplanned downtime. Scheduled component swaps without shutting down the assembly line randomly.

demo.title: Demo Console
demo.subtitle: A realistic ARM fleet sandbox with live-looking telemetry and alerting.
